artifacts.description: Terminal emulation, text rendering optimization, and SwiftTerm integration for modern Swift applications

Ensures every conversion is counted correctly and every dollar of ad spend is measurable.

artifacts.name: Unity Architect

artifacts.description: Open-world and environment specialist - Masters UE5 World Partition, Landscape, procedural foliage, HLOD, and large-scale level streaming for seamless open-world experiences
